title: Career Opportunity Production Engineer at Bharat Heavy Electricals Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Production Engineer at Bharat Heavy Electricals Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Production Engineer with drive and ambition, Bharat Heavy Electricals Advisory Limited in Nagpur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Bharat Heavy Electricals Advisory Limited:
Bharat Heavy Electricals Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bharat Heavy Electricals Advisory Limited!
